scene_title: Holograma de IA sobre altar bíblico
narrative_beat: A imagem da besta — um rosto holográfico de IA flutuando sobre um altar sagrado enquanto adoradores se prostram, Apocalipse 13:15 em sua forma mais literal

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: eye-level, frontal showing altar and hovering hologram
shot.depth_of_field: hologram and altar in focus, worshippers blurred in foreground

subject.primary: golden holographic AI face hovering above stone altar, face composed of light and data, slightly translucent, looking downward with neutral authority
subject.focal_point: the hovering holographic face and the altar surface below it
subject.secondary: ancient stone altar with biblical relief carvings, crimson energy beams connecting hologram down to altar stone surface
props: golden translucent AI hologram face above altar
stone altar with biblical bas-relief carvings
crimson energy beams connecting hologram to altar
dark kneeling worshipper silhouettes in foreground
floating orange embers around the hologram

environment.location: ancient temple ruins with stone columns
environment.time_of_day: interior, no natural light, only hologram and ember glow
environment.atmosphere: dark worship, the idol that breathes — Revelation 13 made technological reality

composition.rule: vertical axis — hologram above, altar center, worshippers below, Ken Burns slow pull-back to reveal full scale
composition.foreground: dark shadowy kneeling worshipper silhouettes barely lit from hologram glow above
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ancient temple ruins — crumbling stone columns, rubble, darkness beyond the altar area

lighting.key_light: golden hologram face providing primary warm light downward onto altar and worshippers
lighting.fill_light: crimson energy beams providing secondary fill light along altar stone surface
lighting.rim_light: thin golden halo around hologram perimeter from its own translucent glow
lighting.mood: technological idolatry, the false god made real, Revelation 13:15 manifested

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: dark reverence, the horror of chosen worship of the artificial

symbolism.primary: the image of the beast given life — the AI hologram receiving worship fulfills Revelation 13:15 precisely
symbolism.secondary: the ancient altar beneath the modern hologram shows idol worship never ended, only updated its form

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
